description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check ASan & UBSan that runs on push to all branches except gh-readonly-queue/** and master, on pull requests, and on merge groups. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, prepares a Linux environment, caches Rust dependencies, builds the project with Clang and AddressSanitizer (ASan) and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer (UBSan), and runs server and headless client tests, unit tests, and integration tests with ASan and UBSan.
